Skill Path: Burglary

You mastered the art of petty theft.

While developing your skills in Thievery you chose to focus specifically on Burglary, learning basic techniques.You gain the following trained feats: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.B9cQLRHtXoLlF0iR]{Concealing Legerdemain}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.jDdOqFmZLwE4dblQ]{Pickpocket}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.hVZbnsDuXihggylt]{Subtle Theft}.

This path focuses on @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.2EE4aF4SZpYf0R6H]{Pick a Lock}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.cYdz2grcOcRt4jk6]{Disable a Device}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.ijZ0DDFpMkWqaShd]{Palm an Object}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.RDXXE7wMrSPCLv5k]{Steal}.

Path Progression

  • Trained: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.B9cQLRHtXoLlF0iR]{Concealing Legerdemain}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.jDdOqFmZLwE4dblQ]{Pickpocket}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.hVZbnsDuXihggylt]{Subtle Theft}
  • Expert: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.RLBYJiGMVkaGL5w9]{Wary Disarmament}
  • Master: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.7GmXKrkzmInkFyEr]{Quick Unlock}
